subject: ⚠️ Mitch is looking at every attack ad against Jon! ⚠️

body:

Friend,

There's been so much news in the past week, so we didn't want this to get lost.

**_According to CNN, Mitch McConnell personally reviews EVERY ad in key races:_** [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2850/5b2c1286/39d9e213/25f325e2/419819791/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_16_mcconnell_ads?refcode=em_2020_09_16_mcconnell_ads_img")
**Friend, Mitch McConnell's super PAC is spending over $22 MILLION on ads against Jon Ossoff in Georgia. And now we know he is _paying close attention to every single one of those attack ads._**
We weren't kidding when we said Mitch McConnell's eyes are on Georgia. **Mitch is _laser-focused_ on stopping Jon from winning in Georgia.**

**[We've got to fight back. Will you make a donation RIGHT NOW to elect Jon and stop Mitch McConnell?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2850/5b2c1286/39d9e213/25f325e5/419819791/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_16_mcconnell_ads?refcode=em_2020_09_16_mcconnell_ads")**

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Actual Progress Towards Peace
body:
Peace in the Middle East! No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Actual Progress Towards Peace](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-j/)
In a blog post a few weeks back, I wrote about the US brokered deal between Israel and the UAE. Well last Friday, it was announced that Bahrain would also normalize relations with Israel. That was followed up yesterday by an historic signing ceremony at the White House. In this week's blog I discuss why these peace deals are very big. Another promise kept by President Trump! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Does More Mail-in Voting Mean More Fraud?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-d/)
Recently there has been a lot of debate about mail-in balloting for the upcoming election. President Trump has been quite vocal in his opposition to mass mail-in voting and the mainstream press has dutifully negated Trump's concerns, regularly framing his views as unfounded and originating from the fringe. In this week's blog, I explain why Trump may have every reason to be cautious about mail-in voting and the increased potential for fraud. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Peace in the Middle East?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-u/)
In this week's blog, I discuss one of the most significant yet underreported victories for President Trump's administration. The historic agreement between Israel and the UAE, establishing normalized relations. They gave President Obama the Noble Peace Prize for much less, for goodness' sake! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [A Tale of Two Conventions](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Democrats finished their national convention last week and the Republican national convention just finished its second night. One convention featured speaker after speaker portraying America as a failed nation full of misery, poverty and angst. Meanwhile, the other convention celebrated everything that makes America the greatest country on earth and focused on the potential that our country can achieve in the future. In this week's blog I discuss both conventions and tell you which I'd rather attend! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jultdkjk-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Standing With Law Enforcement
body:
Peter,Today, I am proud and honored to have earned the support of over 100 members of our law enforcement community. Across the country, we are seeing violence and anarchy in several Democrat-run cities, as many leaders call to defund and dismantle police departments. It is unacceptable. My thoughts and prayers are with our men and women along with their families who stand on the thin blue line. They put their lives on the line every day to answer the call to protect and serve our communities. **Watch "Standing With Law Enforcement" [HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xlhtljy-fuutjhhtj-r/)** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xlhtljy-fuutjhhtj-y/) **See the full Law Enforcement For Hagerty Coalition[ HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xlhtljy-fuutjhhtj-j/)** As your next Senator, I will stand with our law enforcement officers 120 percent to ensure they have the tools they need to do their jobs.

Bill Hagerty

Republican Nominee for U.S. Senate | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xlhtljy-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xlhtljy-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xlhtljy-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xlhtljy-fuutjhhtj-u/)

President Trump has released his shortlist for candidates for the Supreme Court. Here is a sneak preview of a few of the names on the list:

President Trump has released his shortlist for candidates for the Supreme Court. Here is a sneak preview of a few of the names on the list: - Senator Tom Cotton - Senator Josh Hawley - Senator Ted Cruz - And more… The President promised you that he would appoint judges who would uphold the United States Constitution and the rule of law - that is exactly what he’s done and what he will continue to do. There is a reason Sleepy Joe hasn’t released his Supreme Court picks. He’s too afraid Americans would REJECT his radical short-list and he would fall even FURTHER in the polls. It’s going to be an uphill battle heading into November, and we’re calling on YOU to step up and FIGHT FOR YOUR PRESIDENT and the future of this Nation. FOR THE NEXT HOUR: ALL GIFTS 700%-MATCHED! The future of our Nation is at stake if Joe Biden takes over the White House and appoints radicals to the bench. We can’t let that happen. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to support your President and your gift will instantly be 700%-MATCHED. >> DONOR FILE SUPPORTER: dpwillis67@gmail.com ACCOUNT NUMBER: 6124335 - 2020 700%-MATCH: NOT USED DEADLINE: 1 HOUR CONTRIBUTE $5 = $40 CONTRIBUTE $20 = $160 CONTRIBUTE $15 = $120 CONTRIBUTE $10 = $80 CONTRIBUTE $5 = $40 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT We need four more years of President Trump. Just take a look at everything he’s accomplished so far: - 2 Supreme Court Justices have been nominated and confirmed - Justice Neil Gorsuch and Justice Brett Kavanaugh - 53 Circuit Court judges have been nominated and confirmed - 148 District Court judges have been nominated and confirmed. - 2 Court of International Trade judges have been nominated and confirmed. That’s 205 judges in less than FOUR YEARS. President Trump has installed more federal court judges than any past President in FOUR DECADES, and for the first time in 40 YEARS, there are NO circuit court vacancies ANYWHERE in the Nation. Incredible. This is an absolutely HISTORIC accomplishment and is just another reason why we need to re-elect President Trump. He is the ONLY one who will appoint conservative justices to the Supreme Court. What’s decided in this Election will impact our Nation for years to come. We’re sending him a list of ALL Patriots who step up in the NEXT HOUR and we know he’ll be looking for your name. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY for a 700%-MATCH and to get on the list. body:
Tap or click to read more >>
**[🚨 BACK THE BLUE – DONATE TODAY 🚨](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/bb62afb0bc847bb5/c1f5d8acb3eff9f2c3d6b838967d376c/35193)** Friend, While I recently signed onto Governor Abbott’s “Back The Blue” pledge, rioters and extremists are calling to “defund the police”! Sri Kulkarni, my Democrat opponent, has not just accepted the endorsement of “defund the police” organizations... _**he’s taken THOUSANDS of dollars in contributions from their organizations and other anti-law enforcement supporters!**_ This is exactly who I’m talking about when I mention the radical “Defund the Police” organizers fueling the fire of attacks against law enforcement across America. My opponent and his anti-law enforcement supporters are already spending millions attacking my 28 years of law enforcement service. Here’s an idea: instead of defunding the police, we should be giving them MORE of our support to keep our communities and families safe! [Back the Blue. Restore Law and Order!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/bb62afb0bc847bb5/cfcaae871f345523c3d6b838967d376c/35193) Friend, our communities need law enforcement now more than ever. Americans don’t want lawless rioters and anarchists terrorizing their neighborhoods, they want safety, security, and peace of mind. They have powerful allies, too. For the last three weeks, they have been pouring in MILLIONS of dollars into Texas advocating for their radical ideas. Sri Kulkarni is sitting on more than $1.2 million in the bank, and Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats have made turning this seat blue a top priority to grow her grip on power. We can’t let up, Friend. We need EVERY American who backs the blue on board, or we’ll get buried in extremist money... and the “Defund the Police” extremists will be empowered! We have less than two months remaining before the future of Texas, and America, is decided. When that time comes, you don’t want to see the law enforcement haters win while you sat on the sideline. clean_body: Tap or click to read more >> Friend, While I recently signed onto Governor Abbott’s “Back The Blue” pledge, rioters and extremists are calling to “defund the police”! Sri Kulkarni, my Democrat opponent, has not just accepted the endorsement of “defund the police” organizations... he’s taken THOUSANDS of dollars in contributions from their organizations and other anti-law enforcement supporters! This is exactly who I’m talking about when I mention the radical “Defund the Police” organizers fueling the fire of attacks against law enforcement across America. My opponent and his anti-law enforcement supporters are already spending millions attacking my 28 years of law enforcement service. Here’s an idea: instead of defunding the police, we should be giving them MORE of our support to keep our communities and families safe! Friend, our communities need law enforcement now more than ever. Americans don’t want lawless rioters and anarchists terrorizing their neighborhoods, they want safety, security, and peace of mind. They have powerful allies, too. For the last three weeks, they have been pouring in MILLIONS of dollars into Texas advocating for their radical ideas. Sri Kulkarni is sitting on more than $1.2 million in the bank, and Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats have made turning this seat blue a top priority to grow her grip on power. We can’t let up, Friend. We need EVERY American who backs the blue on board, or we’ll get buried in extremist money... and the “Defund the Police” extremists will be empowered! We have less than two months remaining before the future of Texas, and America, is decided. When that time comes, you don’t want to see the law enforcement haters win while you sat on the sideline. Contribute now and do your part to spread my pro-law enforcement, pro-safety, pro-America message and EXPOSE just how wrong Sri Kulkarni is for TX-22. \- Sheriff Troy Nehls | | | ---|--- id:2020-08-12-16:34:53:931t Paid for by Nehls for Congress

name: Kat Cammack
subject: I believe in the Constitution
body:
Our Constitution represents who we are
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00186rbu3M-W7a-dkfxJYaFIc0TIChXzLYk3x-JwTUMYt2xWk_mWvUcFWh3_GxejYyGhAXiw1EoKz_InDsI0PA05a8r62SDWXUUZNsdc8Qo-Ro2_SdKWWmU26tNeea0of-2lJg-O1Mzup5JTA5w3Yl3kTlhPUcQrk8AsD3xkAJrkqVdBo89jr4V3suYlFmqTw0C&c=pyDUR5b9RQjX1--iiyV-icPLzW8O-VXmDI4CVy5DQtBkZcu4gjiS5Q==&ch=XE09kX6TEEVOVik0-8f7GMQwChRif-DjTV26F_8yn6EpPqFy7UvUIg==)
---
| Patriot,
Our Constitution represents who we are. It represents our American values and the foundations laid out for us by our Founding Fathers. It reminds me of the patriots who fought to give us what we have now, life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness!
Now it is our turn to fight for our rights and protect the American dream. The socialist movement being injected into our society by the radical left and the mainstream media is putting our rights in jeopardy. First, they wanted to come for our guns, now they are infringing on our First Amendment rights by censoring our conservative voices. When will it stop?
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00186rbu3M-W7a-dkfxJYaFIc0TIChXzLYk3x-JwTUMYt2xWk_mWvUcFWh3_GxejYyGUfJdNbcortFN4IySHwY7poKLa8_4Sm0eVIPFd-ApauCLvoLuMYxUVBMQyzRYO3In3FfhnJCS5E4irHW_WnfWgC29CABPRbKQ80fY6cltYLsQOaYvJXbLqpStH9gYnGg6OnhdrHzj_rT_Hki6W6FxBQ==&c=pyDUR5b9RQjX1--iiyV-icPLzW8O-VXmDI4CVy5DQtBkZcu4gjiS5Q==&ch=XE09kX6TEEVOVik0-8f7GMQwChRif-DjTV26F_8yn6EpPqFy7UvUIg==)
---
| As we celebrate Constitution Day and all the amazing citizens of our nation, let's remember that our nation is the greatest country on earth because of its citizens!
I am a proud American and a servant to my community. I uphold the Constitution and will continue to fight to ensure your Second Amendment rights are protected and you have a conservative voice in Congress.
---
| My duty will be to make YOU a priority in Washington, D.C. and STOP anyone who wants to prevent you from exercising your constitutional rights. North Central Florida is home to some of the most hard-working people in the nation. We do not shy away from anyone who wishes to disrupt the success, prosperity, and loving community that we have built for ourselves.
I am grateful for every hardworking Floridian who fights to keep our state and our nation GREAT! I look forward to continuing the fight for you in Congress to make our future even brighter! God Bless,
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00186rbu3M-W7a-dkfxJYaFIc0TIChXzLYk3x-JwTUMYt2xWk_mWvUcFWh3_GxejYyGhAXiw1EoKz_InDsI0PA05a8r62SDWXUUZNsdc8Qo-Ro2_SdKWWmU26tNeea0of-2lJg-O1Mzup5JTA5w3Yl3kTlhPUcQrk8AsD3xkAJrkqVdBo89jr4V3suYlFmqTw0C&c=pyDUR5b9RQjX1--iiyV-icPLzW8O-VXmDI4CVy5DQtBkZcu4gjiS5Q==&ch=XE09kX6TEEVOVik0-8f7GMQwChRif-DjTV26F_8yn6EpPqFy7UvUIg==)

Peter - with fewer than 50 days until Election Day, Gov. Kasich has been busy sharing his message about why we need to heal the divisions in our country and how each of us can make a difference with our vote.

Please see the brief summary below and consider [chipping in to support this mission!](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=b9b76c92809a4d57a661521c0b118821&_e=xtTTtEHWt_v7vBtAdb0rhIuerJl3Sqiob5vpRwKelLwdfDNi9hvKpD7qu3fxGrqp-o4FM3raAO0pWIms6cpv25tchRRENCG5SaTTNvXL1-HbkbE-rRWwdgw27W05kyro_WTpd7HO91Lw2ICWsRMjOE_frG5uOXy4Hjc6K7xOdKzNb1lQDvMn56jZA-G7dhUCQQh6cBY8nqVIoHW6fwEnd4YrtEivAbhUIw0SHrZzrs0bkt5XircFbw6g56bnORVeK4ggzFsv8cj9IkbIRn-MAQ%3D%3D) Thank you.

-Team Kasich

[Read more here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=b9b76c92809a4d57a661521c0b118821&_e=xtTTtEHWt_v7vBtAdb0rhBpbMlpziWVciQf_s20r2dJCldImYmvAplXZ5Ja3LaD03qS1wa2LwxprwX1DnJxoRnW1gMNPeG_Fl7AaeYnCx5IPqe73kCfFRC4QNTkwE_JJ8DcxXN14KVB8gjnrkBM2gVMDRnJ_BDo4t2DNU3eeCwa0JMIr8p9_HCRx0gMU1ZqucczdQgQmolUZcGAZ2mosaksc-HDR2z5ArQ0f8CT7Q2W0ikQ_peR9YNoz6NGeutD-VzXtdp1FLMG7TPllenGHxoWX5S7j-grtmtsZ7Dllu8IKxqoiP7cfbf_46Cr1JpxqqJT7bRAPisVrpGuGOw5I4cCUi5gdeaaAj-Bor47N3Jg%3D).

Kasich noted the absurdity by likening this to the governor of a state not telling people about an approaching hurricane. [Watch the clip here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=b9b76c92809a4d57a661521c0b118821&_e=xtTTtEHWt_v7vBtAdb0rhN5W-SofafbLL21924MCfVXnuwflyBD5MSm2IqVJZeFAVKpxb9Zy4_k-bP7Ju9vnInHzqjaHEikj5hbxCpObZ4j3qdpE4kUhua4IiWk4GnKjQ5Ep-dC6zcD6e1Ug2uaZWi_4d0EiByuOYYDz582Cobx5VsbWdlD9-iDX3Rn6Un1Idp3J7X96Fc1dUqxddYKxHLY0c1iWNuf3B2b4JYAnyTKu8d2n-5bN918jNxGkS36X8hmiZdhNCBMSTqj9BVwjSQiytAj0-qsmybErmrU1NJk4tNM2ZsYtI2JCz71zXOF8).

**USA Today Op-Ed:** [Look to God for the strength to transcend divisions and build a more just America](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=b9b76c92809a4d57a661521c0b118821&_e=xtTTtEHWt_v7vBtAdb0rhCtKhLOoVq9AYfDazKhLNz2C8xopHcCvf7E7olZ-Al3WMSPwSUmjkncpFVkgncpVUb9FMRlyUwIzKczW3FiZcYaP6KBvBmt14Lc27rrqbglGI0wmHiLDCJCNEsItL2htKEyJAV5hH15IBcOQCYJSH2Q9n0xydPqM3X7gFbBOZgPHR4NGOzmoflJa8CjCGfxgQdfI0c87XvJHkzuF334qqwOly-3-hz7Loh9R6oQdWSJDznn9KsBbXVndlzgW209GwRmHHS5SqC0V6rIQJB8VHnZIGAVzlwiD5cP4p0GEQ2pJkQSaOr9oSdpda0lRlGlWvm61e_Z_cb7JxEX_gceDm5PbchIIl3lqpDQb2ciRrnjR8bfk2j4oB1VkMYSld9JQwg%3D%3D)

**Excerpt:** _"Sometimes in America it feels like the idea of God has become old-fashioned. In some circles, the idea that God can intervene in man’s affairs for good seems almost preposterous. This troubles me, but I believe this erosion in faith has come about for many reasons._

_As I look across the landscape of our country and see the deep division among our political leaders that has now spread like a disease to the division among our friends, our families and our neighbors, I am reminded that all great and lasting change comes from the bottom up..."_

_"And yet the divisions now facing our country threaten to disrupt what makes our country great, and it’s gotten to where many caring, thinking Americans are worried about our shared future. How do begin to make repairs to the fabric of our nation? Well, unity of purpose is needed, and it seems to be a dwindling resource."_

[Read the full op-ed here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=b9b76c92809a4d57a661521c0b118821&_e=xtTTtEHWt_v7vBtAdb0rhCtKhLOoVq9AYfDazKhLNz2C8xopHcCvf7E7olZ-Al3WMSPwSUmjkncpFVkgncpVUb9FMRlyUwIzKczW3FiZcYaP6KBvBmt14Lc27rrqbglGI0wmHiLDCJCNEsItL2htKEyJAV5hH15IBcOQCYJSH2Q9n0xydPqM3X7gFbBOZgPH0LkWqIXAamvB7dc3UOfJFDyfmL32AkrAvh6Tw9HWztpsKP315jArd-0ivzY1decK1NRx4ReU67_7jyd_dSOeYEZuQQ5-Tj2h-Nyztdc2u53gk_A7bZXtCCtZI7N9Cdoems-mwU1tw5GSzV-hDTXkCCRpCROlVif7qQ9-TRT_txqKA-FBxzTHkUX36SL_4EWFqm5cPm-Y8beNtHyImqSPLQ%3D%3D).
|

Gov. Kasich has been calling for a healing in America for a long time now and you can be assured that he will be keeping his voice out there to make a difference. We really are all in this together.

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Do you know what today is?
body:
Peter,
Today, we celebrate Constitution Day. It is this day, 233 years ago, that our Founding Fathers set history in motion by signing their names to the U.S. Constitution.
It’s worth pausing for a moment to think about this achievement, and ask ourselves — if the Founders were here today, would they be proud?
These men, who fought a revolution to establish self-governance and the rule of law, what would they think about public officials who allow mobs of anarchists to control city streets and destroy public property?
These men, who founded a nation on the self-evident truth that life is an unalienable right, how would they react when told that over half a million babies are killed in the womb each year?
After fighting to adopt a Bill of Rights that would specifically protect freedom of expression, what would they think of cancel culture, and the fact that so many Americans are afraid to voice their opinions for fear of public retribution?
It’s safe to say that we have a lot of work to do. But the good news for us is that in less than 2 months, we have an opportunity to reestablish the values of our Constitution.
We have a chance to restore the principles of limited government, religious liberty, freedom of speech, respect for life and so much more.
As much as the media and pop culture would have you think otherwise, the majority of our citizens still believe in these values. It’s our job to find them, and make sure they vote.
Our strategy involves peer-to-peer texting to reach people directly, PSAs in ten target states, and starting October 4, one of the largest evangelical TV ad buys ever done.
[**_And so, on this Constitution Day, please help us restore the vision of our nation’s founders by supporting My Faith Votes with a donation of whatever you can afford._**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200917apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200917apl01nd&n=1)
Help us remind the world that here in America, our rights don’t come from government, but from God.
Help us show that religion isn’t just some nice thing we practice on Sundays, but the central underpinning of our society which our elected leaders must swear to protect.
A lot of loud voices tell us that our Founders aren’t just irrelevant or wrong, but that they were evil. They want some new system built on entirely different values, values that throughout history have always led to misery and despair.
We know better, and we are going to make our voices heard loud and clear.
[**_I hope you will continue to fund the incredible work of My Faith Votes. To honor those that came before us, and to ensure a bright future for those who will come after us, we must keep fighting._**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200917apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200917apl01nd&n=2)
That’s what we are doing every day, and we are glad you’re right there with us.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200917apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200917apl01nd&n=3 "Donate Today") [Donate Today](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200917apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200917apl01nd&n=4)
---
Sincerely,

Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200917apl01nd&n=5)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134

---
A lot of people ask about my tattoos, and I think it's an important story for you to hear, Peter.

When I was flying a medevac mission in Afghanistan, my helicopter came under fire and I took shrapnel to my arm and shoulder. We continued the mission, managing to get our crew and patients to safe ground, and we held out surrounded by enemy fighters until rescue choppers made it to us. As our wounded were loaded into one of the helicopters, I strapped myself to the skids of the other and returned fire as we flew back to base.

The shrapnel I took left scars all across my shoulder and arm, and they were a constant reminder of the pain of that day. So I decided to turn the scars into something beautiful -- my tattoos.

Why am I telling you this? **Because I know how to face tough challenges.** Winning this race and then leading in the U.S. Senate won't be easy, but this team can get it done -- just like my team got it done on that day in Afghanistan. **[Will you help me in my fight, Peter?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f56/7f51f7bc/45114c4e/4efa1fc5/4285174451/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200917.1nd__2118__&amount=10")**

Look, when facing down 150 Taliban fighters that day I upheld my oath to our country. You better believe that I won't cower to the special interests or Washington bosses. I'll put country over politics in the Senate, always.

**But I need your help to get there. Can you make a donation today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19234633/252320776/-940294256?refcode=091720-john-kerry&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIzZTJhMy0wZWY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TizCCsRguaUQdN6Z8YzcmYbQnSbvY5wD0LgXv0VheM=&emci=4d62a0ae-7cf7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=1ab3e2a3-0ef9-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)

Friend,

I am proud to support Margaret Good as she works to flip Florida’s 16th Congressional District from red to blue, and I’ll tell you why: **Margaret is a fighter for Florida’s environmental future.**

Margaret understands that the decisions we make right now will impact our environment for years to come. In Congress, she will continue to stand up to special interests and polluters, and take real action on climate change.

**[If we are going to keep control of the House of Representatives and enact a real agenda to protect our environment, we need Margaret’s voice. Can you join me in supporting her by chipping in to her campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19234635/252320778/1073285021?refcode2=1ab3e2a3-0ef9-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=4d62a0ae-7cf7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=1ab3e2a3-0ef9-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=091720-john-kerry&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIzZTJhMy0wZWY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TizCCsRguaUQdN6Z8YzcmYbQnSbvY5wD0LgXv0VheM=)**

Margaret has fought to improve our water quality, sponsored bold legislation to begin Florida’s transition to clean energy, and advocated for full funding of land preservation. Her opponent, Vern Buchanan, voted to roll back Clean Water Act protections, voted for the “Poison Our Waters Act,” and voted to allow oil drilling off our coasts.

Margaret is the only real environmental champion in this race, and it shows. **That is why Margaret Good has been endorsed by the League of Conservation Voters and received an “A” rating by the Sierra Club, while her opponent has one of the worst environmental records in Congress.**

**[We cannot afford to wait any longer to fight climate change, protect our environment, and create good, well-paying clean energy jobs. Please, join me in supporting Margaret’s campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19234637/252320780/1073285021?refcode2=1ab3e2a3-0ef9-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=4d62a0ae-7cf7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=1ab3e2a3-0ef9-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=091720-john-kerry&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIzZTJhMy0wZWY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TizCCsRguaUQdN6Z8YzcmYbQnSbvY5wD0LgXv0VheM=)**

Together, we can flip this district blue, send Margaret to Congress, and work to protect our environment against polluters and special interests.

Thanks for supporting Margaret and our environment,

John Kerry

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19234639/252320782/1073285021?refcode2=1ab3e2a3-0ef9-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=4d62a0ae-7cf7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=1ab3e2a3-0ef9-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=091720-john-kerry&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWIzZTJhMy0wZWY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TizCCsRguaUQdN6Z8YzcmYbQnSbvY5wD0LgXv0VheM=)

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS

Margaret Good for Congress

Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Nuestro PAC's new ad features music by the Chicano band Las Cafeteras | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c09927b72d2c/if-i-were-president-12496519?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| | Dear friend,
I am so excited to share [Nuestro PAC](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=da806975e7&e=b8f90417f9)'s latest ad for the presidential race! “If I Were President” is based on the song it features from the Chicano band [Las Cafeteras](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=facc5db2fe&e=b8f90417f9). The ad features Biden in his own words describing his platform for Latino families.

As you all know, Latino outreach is increasingly becoming a hot topic leading up to November 3rd, so Nuestro PAC is addressing the concern head on with the bilingual ad. “If I Were President” will run on TV and digitally in battleground states both in longform and as well as this 60 second version below.
---
| [ ](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=a12761eeb6&e=b8f90417f9)
---
| If you love the ad as much as I do, please share it with your friends and family on social media. Let's get **#IfIWerePresident** trending!

In solidarity,

Chuck Rocha

body:
Kara is not giving up and she can't afford you to give up either, Peter.
|
---

| | Peter, I'm asking for your help.

[**_Now she has an unprecedented opportunity to unseat him in 2020. But she can 't afford to miss a single goal, and she needs to raise $9,024 today alone. Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e85e/77d4c309/21b68b52/2635ffea/2734697977/VEsHBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e85e/77d4c309/21b68b52/2635ff95/2734697977/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e85e/77d4c309/21b68b52/2635ff94/2734697977/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

clean_body: | = | | Team ― this campaign is one of the most important things I’ve ever done. So much is on the line for families across TX-10 and all around the country, from guaranteeing healthcare, to fighting our ongoing climate crisis, to achieving equal justice under the law. I’m honored to be bringing progressive policies to our area of Texas. But friends, we’re staring down the most important few weeks of this campaign,and our opponent is raking in corporate cash and churning out cookie-cutter attacks faster than we can handle. We need to ramp up our efforts to share the truth about our campaign with voters all throughout the district, but doing so is more expensive than ever. We need your help, friend. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Republicans are starting to feel the heat of this race, and they’re getting scared. But that’s when the dollars start flowing in the most , and Michael McCaul’s corporate donors and rich Washington Republican friends are cutting big checks to blunt our momentum. We don’t have corporate PACs funding our campaign ― and we don’t want them. name: Brianna Carmen
subject: 32 million Latinxs could vote this year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTO LATINO
body:
We’re the biggest ethnic minority ever to have a say in a presidential election. |
#
| **[**“Had the Latino turnout been higher in those states in 2016, Mr. Trump might not be president.”
\-- _The New York Times_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19235998/252326267/-1470311936?refcode=20200917&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjBjNWMxNy0xMWY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90Y1giH1CWpPapwFDlrZlCse479uEUN2xzjxALlCcDo=)**
---
Peter --

Did you know?: More than half of Latinxs who were eligible to vote in the 2016 general election ... **_didn’t_.****That’s a hard truth -- because if all those people had voted, there’s a good chance Donald Trump wouldn’t be our president right now.**
[Donate now to help us register and mobilize Latinx voters across the country!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19235999/252326268/-1470311936?refcode=20200917&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjBjNWMxNy0xMWY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90Y1giH1CWpPapwFDlrZlCse479uEUN2xzjxALlCcDo=)
---
This year, there will be _even more_ eligible Latinx voters than there were in 2016: **at least 32 million in total**. We’re the biggest ethnic minority ever to have a say in a presidential election. So we absolutely need to show up. That’s especially true in critical swing states like Florida, Arizona, and Texas where we have super impactful voices -- if we choose to use them.

We can’t change the past, but we can decide our future. Will you chip in and help us make sure history doesn’t repeat itself this November?
[Donate $15 to register a voter](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19236000/252326269/-1470311936?refcode=20200917&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjBjNWMxNy0xMWY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90Y1giH1CWpPapwFDlrZlCse479uEUN2xzjxALlCcDo=)
---
We’ve registered 300,000 new voters, **and we need your support to keep going strong all the way until the election.[Can we count on you to pitch in now, while there’s still time, to make sure we don’t repeat the mistakes of 2016?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19236001/252326270/-1470311936?refcode=20200917&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjBjNWMxNy0xMWY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90Y1giH1CWpPapwFDlrZlCse479uEUN2xzjxALlCcDo=)**

Thank you so much,

Your friends at Voto Latino

name: Team Collins
subject: Beep! Beep! We’re hitting the road again! 🚌💨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for SenatorP
body:
The amount of money being spent in Maine right now is astounding. I’ve never seen anything like it but neither has anyone else. Right now my opponent and her wealthy friends are pouring millions into Maine with one goal in mind: defeating me.To unsubscribe click here http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0Nzk3NTQS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTQ2NzA0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0

http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0Nzk3NTQS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTQ2NzA0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0

Peter,

The amount of money being spent in Maine right now is astounding. I’ve never seen anything like it but neither has anyone else. Right now my opponent and her wealthy friends are pouring millions into Maine with one goal in mind: defeating me.

Except, here’s what my opponent and her friends don’t understand: this election isn’t about me. It’s about YOU. It’s about our friends and family. It’s about our neighborhoods, our towns and cities and our country. It’s about ensuring that we leave our nation better than when we inherited it.

My opponent is running a vicious campaign against me because she’s being told to do so. Chuck Schumer and Elizabeth Warren are controlling her every move, and the reality is if she were to win, they would control everything she did in the Senate.

That truly scares me to think about, and it reminds me that again this election is not about me. It’s about our future.

The actions you and I take today, right now in this very moment are going to have impacts on future generations. That’s why we can’t afford to sit by and just hope things work out in November. I am working around the clock to ensure every Maine voter knows both the truth about my failed opponent and the truth about me.

But I can’t do this alone. I need your support.

Won’t you please stand with my campaign before time runs out?DONATE $5 >>> http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0Nzk3NTQS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTQ2NzA0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0

No donation is too small. Every dollar donated goes immediately towards my campaign’s efforts to fight back. And every dollar donated means the world to me. I know how hard you work for your paycheck and how valuable it is. I wouldn’t be asking for your donation if it wasn’t critical -- and Peter, it’s beyond critical.

I’m not going to stop fighting, and I hope you won’t either. Our future is on the line and our future is worth fighting for.

Sincerely,

http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0Nzk3NTQS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTQ2NzA0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0

Susan Collins

subject: It’s Now or Never - We’re Telling the Whole Story
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=237A501A20A2214)

| |
---
| | |
---
| | Dear Friend,

We launched [this video](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=237A501A20A2215) on television in battleground states today!

---
| | [ ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=237A501A20A2215)
---
| |
Our purpose is to tell the full story of the well-orchestrated assault happening right now on American elections - and to mobilize people in an effort to stop it.

We kicked things off with a [Fox and Friends interview](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=237A501A20A2216):

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=237A501A20A2216)
---
| |
Already this morning, President Trump has tweeted about us twice!
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
This video kicks off a very proactive plan of advertising, recruiting, training, and tracking, including national command center operations with daily streaming video. I leave tomorrow to go to D.C. in an effort to build more support with key agencies. None of this would be possible without your support.

On behalf of everyone at True the Vote and more than 100,000 volunteers, thank you for your support and guidance.

Stay tuned for news about our nationwide War Room and True the Vote Live!

---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote

P.S.
Shorter versions of the video are also being pushed across all social media platforms.

name: Sri (personal)
subject: (no subject line)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

Nancy Pelosi has dedicated her life to public service -- and like me, she knows the importance of ensuring we elect fighters up and down the ballot who will champion the people they represent.

**Friend, I’m running for Congress to be that fighter.**

I’m running for Congress to uplift _all_ of us in TX-22 and fight for the issues that matter, from ensuring that all of us get access to the health care we need to prioritizing our working families as we build a road to economic recovery.

[**I’m grateful that Speaker Pelosi understands the stakes in this fight, friend. And I’m asking you to join that fight by chipping into our campaign -- we have 47 days to go and we need all hands on deck.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19238622/252335892/1226323243?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.17_b1_sp_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODhmZTYzYi0xY2Y5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwrkBBhYLr148G5vMt_5Kq316v70Jk-oBmmoiVKWZgw=)

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19238623/252335894/1226323243?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.17_b1_sp_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODhmZTYzYi0xY2Y5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwrkBBhYLr148G5vMt_5Kq316v70Jk-oBmmoiVKWZgw=)

Thanks,

Sri

\---FWD---

On September 16, 2020, Nancy Pelosi wrote:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19238625/252335895/1226323243?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.17_b1_sp_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODhmZTYzYi0xY2Y5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwrkBBhYLr148G5vMt_5Kq316v70Jk-oBmmoiVKWZgw=)

|
Friend,

In 2018, Americans delivered the House of Representatives to Democrats because **our country demanded change from a government that was failing us.** And since then, we have fought every day to enact an agenda for the people.

We’ve fought for accountability and justice from this corrupt administration.

We’ve championed civil rights, passing major voting rights reforms and historic legislation like the Equality Act to protect marginalized people everywhere.

And we’ve led the charge on building a more equitable and affordable health care system, even as Republicans repeatedly tried to gut the Affordable Care Act and strip health care away from millions of Americans.

**In 48 days, we’ll get a chance to deliver an even stronger mandate for change by winning the White House, flipping the Senate, and expanding our House majority -- and we can only do that by electing leaders like Sri Preston Kulkarni, a proven leader for the people of TX-22.**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: RSVP to join Cory Booker and me on Zoom!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
You won't want to miss this!
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8151%2E868730%2EUFAbRo) Friend, It's good to have a friend in the fight against the climate crisis, especially as so many of us are seeing the real-time effects in smoke-filled skies -- and my friend Cory Booker is a great one. He's committed, just like I am, to making this a priority. When I'm fighting so hard here in Washington state, it's good to know I have a counterpart fighting just as hard over in Washington, D.C. **We'll talk about all that and more on Zoom next Monday, September 21st, at 4:00 p.m. PT / 7:00 p.m. ET. Can you make it?[Chip in $5 or whatever feels right to you, and you'll be RSVPed to join us to talk about the climate crisis and how we can all make progress no matter where or who we are.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11224?t=4&akid=8151%2E868730%2EUFAbRo)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11340?t=5&akid=8151%2E868730%2EUFAbRo)

Very truly yours,
Jay

subject: Help us buy more yard signs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9dd5525f0fd6/help-us-buy-more-yard-signs?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Yard signs. They are probably the most iconic part of a campaign. They also offer supporters an easy avenue to spread name recognition for their candidate. So far, we have distributed over 1,700 signs! That is an impressive number, especially when you consider the fact that we only started putting up yard signs less than a month ago. We offer yard signs free-of-charge to our supporters, to make sure that their choice this November and their support of our message can reach their neighbors. Every yard sign costs us $1.30 to produce. It might not sound like a lot, but I refuse to take money from special interest groups and corporate PACs. That means I rely on donors like you to fund this campaign. [Click here to chip in and help fund our yard sign program. For every $10 you contribute, we are able to put up 7 signs.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=16e9d9c4a9&e=140a9b81e7) Yard signs are an inexpensive way for us to boost name recognition in a larger, mostly rural district like ours. We have data that shows name recognition is the most significant barrier that stands in the way of our victory, with voters still undecided. And you know more than anyone that when voters learn about our campaign and the values we are fighting for, they voice their support. [I hope I can count on you to help us buy more yard signs to spread our message.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=6966ddfb62&e=140a9b81e7) Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---
| [Click here to help us get more yard signs!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=cc19ed90d5&e=140a9b81e7 "Click here to help us get more yard signs!")

clean_body: | | | | | | | Yard signs. They are probably the most iconic part of a campaign. They also offer supporters an easy avenue to spread name recognition for their candidate. So far, we have distributed over 1,700 signs! That is an impressive number, especially when you consider the fact that we only started putting up yard signs less than a month ago. We offer yard signs free-of-charge to our supporters, to make sure that their choice this November and their support of our message can reach their neighbors. Every yard sign costs us $1.30 to produce. It might not sound like a lot, but I refuse to take money from special interest groups and corporate PACs. That means I rely on donors like you to fund this campaign. Yard signs are an inexpensive way for us to boost name recognition in a larger, mostly rural district like ours. We have data that shows name recognition is the most significant barrier that stands in the way of our victory, with voters still undecided. And you know more than anyone that when voters learn about our campaign and the values we are fighting for, they voice their support. Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16 | "Click here to help us get more yard signs!" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Dani for Illinois | Our mailing address is: Dani for Illinois PO Box 1671 LaSalle, IL 61301 Want to change how you receive these emails? Peter, unrest is taking over our cities and communities: _**businesses are being looted**_ , _**homes are being burnt down**_ , and _**officers are being attacked**_. That’s why there’s a clear choice this November! Will we choose the **Democrats' “Anti-Police”** **Agenda** or **Republicans' “Back the Blue” Agenda?**
[**Back the Blue** ](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=44acb47c584e46a2a4d533a5d34cedf7&_e=85DHAWlCVlShEbcH7nZTUe_z0XVqJvNCpfUZ40uf6c82szrDUKeVq8K4iDBRI2okGEMdvjmcfwoHoxLJqwbYMmROIZkH9T2DGDtJ4Swl-UbrKdBJDVY7Xnw6EusJuKct3YA88cuTOSMtgUt-pTGk4vxdJOtDwZ5SUoiE7igCZ1KB9pH3lvByg8Fhuekog50AE5U-JWGrUkHhYcI9ioAU_2HBuwG76BN5POzM2kOmNGmGODblwyNvlR6gLer4oN8ZDNmoiglUk2PKLK2ysxrWUb8GSLSmhUtBYULcd1Q4S7nD-l-IsUZLNg-2iz5EJ5uQfxsW8ro68uS_rjjDdkuXf7uByWKyPSzSDGyFgjdrcnQZQFIsS6KZ0D9_3B2ODOxC3NG62Cev8Wif5p4lnpu8kv0PqGWNMEl5_z32cj9FjY56NRJz_VTLWTbFX-eTSbux)

❌ Ignore the Rising Crime in Our Cities
❌ Taking Away Life Saving Equipment from Police
❌ Defunding Our Police
**Republicans’ “Back the Blue” Agenda**
🇺🇸 Defending the Middle Class
🇺🇸 Keeping Taxes Down
🇺🇸 Opposing Budgets that Hurt Our Police
🇺🇸 Defund Defend the Police

[**Back the Blue** ](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=44acb47c584e46a2a4d533a5d34cedf7&_e=85DHAWlCVlShEbcH7nZTUe_z0XVqJvNCpfUZ40uf6c82szrDUKeVq8K4iDBRI2okGEMdvjmcfwoHoxLJqwbYMmROIZkH9T2DGDtJ4Swl-UbrKdBJDVY7Xnw6EusJuKct3YA88cuTOSMtgUt-pTGk4vxdJOtDwZ5SUoiE7igCZ1KB9pH3lvByg8Fhuekog50AE5U-JWGrUkHhYcI9ioAU_534IFNYyvYI2GdbQJCTCWWOnQoxrZSdD3ZYC82YLMHujlpus5JrUcTOy0MS2aLr4YhelDjRjvBOsWyFfpXFqvigLBv2IpTWn3_LHBavG5WJghxeHfJsm2J9b7BSo7zts7pl9w93Zp8mV-WsoKEbOlcAX8K2bcNxwBGDA34-oSO1c3E4BEszsfnfcRSCdoj_70uYlyDRInM6INhYCDnIe6CRENY2modG13osOh0aIzTq)
While my opponent, Jackie Gordon, continues her silence on the violence erupting in our cities, I’m not afraid to condemn the constant mob violence and stand with our Police.

**I’m the only candidate in this race who will 🇺🇸BACK THE BLUE 🇺🇸and stand for Law & Order this November!**

Andrew Garbarino

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Israel-UAE-Bahrain Agreements Show Why Trump Was Nominated for Nobel Peace Prize
body:
President Trump’s unorthodox approach to foreign policy has paid off. While his critics at home would never admit it, not everyone turns a blind eye | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=36dedd69a8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Israel-UAE-Bahrain Agreements Show Why Trump Was Nominated for Nobel Peace Prize**

“President Trump’s unorthodox approach to foreign policy has paid off. While his critics at home would never admit it, not everyone turns a blind eye to his accomplishments,” foreign policy expert James Carafano writes for Fox News.

“For two years running, foreign lawmakers have nominated the president of the United States for the Nobel Peace Prize . . . He has demonstrated the kind of statesmanship that brings real peace without compromise and protects the vital national interests and security of all Americans. The winners are the American people.”

[Clink here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=869b706bff&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Early estimates from insurance agencies say the cost of this summer’s rioting will set a record . . . The cause of violence is not the police. It is not poverty. It is not one’s race. To say so is in fact a smear against poor people and people of the racial group identified. The cause of violence is the people who have chosen to be violent,” Joy Pullmann writes in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=81f6b9b508&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Minneapolis city councilors told the city police chief Tuesday that their residents are feeling ‘terrorized’ and say police are ‘nowhere to be seen,’” Justine Coleman reports. “The meeting this week came months after the city council unanimously voted to amend the city’s charter to allow the city police department to be dismantled.” Read more in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fe7df26e14&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Two undocumented immigrants suspected in the gang slaying of a 16-year-old girl in Baltimore were released because of sanctuary city policies, despite requests from federal immigration officials . . . Five people are charged in the killing—three of whom were living in the United States illegally,” Louis Casiano reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9373828f4d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Let's take this outside
body:
2 new ways we're helping local businesses
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Yesterday, we announced a new partnership with [Jobcase](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001alCep0BEU8yxNQy74rnMmpUDFfYYFIbz4hC7rixmryW1Gve15a2uraGmsKAXPSZukqco61eMC0mBs_6jU9toSSCvBRlOZ9fzlgrt-O2fet34u93do3--lI42GVp5nMiCR1Ltl8CrT1s=&c=6S4YbV2Z00ikq2l8s5cl7pz8iEUqhvnOMaasy2CqVYGkRvrHhaM2nw==&ch=9nab2Aj5K_vlFYvuQ5V_SD9PotGPhmHeW_5lfei0tkwiYSsRLlqv4A==) and provided an update on extended unemployment benefits. Today, I want to talk about two programs to help businesses in Rhode Island: Restore RI and Take It Outside.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001alCep0BEU8yxNQy74rnMmpUDFfYYFIbz4hC7rixmryW1Gve15a2urfBddJZO2cmyLce9CAJd1PHv2R0UtnO-H3FaxUqGKZwZ2WzHPnHzAewKhybCN1oH7Z_XA9o7n9Ut76rpDdyYX5EUAjTEDC9JLHaiX8gLCJo5jhqtoSK_ISDx3yY1G72Nr7FZaoEQ5bbQ3Wm_p3Lx52w=&c=6S4YbV2Z00ikq2l8s5cl7pz8iEUqhvnOMaasy2CqVYGkRvrHhaM2nw==&ch=9nab2Aj5K_vlFYvuQ5V_SD9PotGPhmHeW_5lfei0tkwiYSsRLlqv4A==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001alCep0BEU8yxNQy74rnMmpUDFfYYFIbz4hC7rixmryW1Gve15a2urfBddJZO2cmyLce9CAJd1PHv2R0UtnO-H3FaxUqGKZwZ2WzHPnHzAewKhybCN1oH7Z_XA9o7n9Ut76rpDdyYX5EUAjTEDC9JLHaiX8gLCJo5jhqtoSK_ISDx3yY1G72Nr7FZaoEQ5bbQ3Wm_p3Lx52w=&c=6S4YbV2Z00ikq2l8s5cl7pz8iEUqhvnOMaasy2CqVYGkRvrHhaM2nw==&ch=9nab2Aj5K_vlFYvuQ5V_SD9PotGPhmHeW_5lfei0tkwiYSsRLlqv4A==).
---
| We're expanding eligibility for the [Restore RI](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001alCep0BEU8yxNQy74rnMmpUDFfYYFIbz4hC7rixmryW1Gve15a2urStK68A5iBJ-dAWdj9fgK4saZZbuwxKTZBVqI2ydalNlsqm8hYJlY1-v_g4dgNq1COOrIfHWqZ8sLGqltZzEPOc-4-U1cpk7aTGBQ4BoyjynNXwJtkeoFjMpo1emsN2WJg==&c=6S4YbV2Z00ikq2l8s5cl7pz8iEUqhvnOMaasy2CqVYGkRvrHhaM2nw==&ch=9nab2Aj5K_vlFYvuQ5V_SD9PotGPhmHeW_5lfei0tkwiYSsRLlqv4A==) small business support program to make sole proprietors and other businesses with no employees eligible for funding. We're also lowering the revenue loss requirement from 50% to 30% for non-severely impacted businesses and allowing any business with fewer than 50 employees to apply, up from the previous cap of 20.
To date, we've provided more than $7 million to more than 800 small businesses across Rhode Island, and we're continuing to accept and process applications. And we've dedicated more than $100 million to supporting our small businesses, half of which is available in this first round of grants, and we're committed to making more money available as needed.
---
|
---
| When we said "Take It Outside," Dr. Lagina Bickham, Loretta Bickham Talbot and Pamela Gordon went above and beyond. They're bringing joy to Rhode Islanders with their colorful, socially distanced setup.
---
| Making sure that our local companies have the opportunity to conduct their business safely is a top priority. Through the [Take It Outside](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001alCep0BEU8yxNQy74rnMmpUDFfYYFIbz4hC7rixmryW1Gve15a2uraGmsKAXPSZuDHo5dNqA6fxylsi-rI714FUqqy3pdrbsAeZobafWUCmiQ6gGgLdt32fgBttELjC9ecbgGamjIE0nT1sxCVoy7A==&c=6S4YbV2Z00ikq2l8s5cl7pz8iEUqhvnOMaasy2CqVYGkRvrHhaM2nw==&ch=9nab2Aj5K_vlFYvuQ5V_SD9PotGPhmHeW_5lfei0tkwiYSsRLlqv4A==) campaign, we've made nearly two dozen state properties available for use, and cities and towns across Rhode Island have launched their own initiatives to increase use of public space.
We're also making an additional $1 million of our stimulus money available to municipalities and community organizations to fund initiatives that make it easier to do business outside. This could be anything from heat lamps, tents, and outdoor WiFi systems to bike racks, tables, chairs, outdoor lighting and more.
We need to give our local businesses every tool possible to keep the lights on while we combat this pandemic. If you or someone you know needs help with their small business, please reach out to us at (401) 521-HELP or e-mail [info@commerceri.com](mailto:info@commerceri.com).
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. clean_body: 2 new ways we're helping local businesses | | | | | | | Hello friend, Yesterday, we announced a new partnership with == and provided an update on extended unemployment benefits. Today, I want to talk about two programs to help businesses in Rhode Island: Restore RI and Take It Outside. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | We're expanding eligibility for the == small business support program to make sole proprietors and other businesses with no employees eligible for funding. We're also lowering the revenue loss requirement from 50% to 30% for non-severely impacted businesses and allowing any business with fewer than 50 employees to apply, up from the previous cap of 20. To date, we've provided more than $7 million to more than 800 small businesses across Rhode Island, and we're continuing to accept and process applications. And we've dedicated more than $100 million to supporting our small businesses, half of which is available in this first round of grants, and we're committed to making more money available as needed. | | When we said "Take It Outside," Dr. Lagina Bickham, Loretta Bickham Talbot and Pamela Gordon went above and beyond. They're bringing joy to Rhode Islanders with their colorful, socially distanced setup. | Making sure that our local companies have the opportunity to conduct their business safely is a top priority. Through the == campaign, we've made nearly two dozen state properties available for use, and cities and towns across Rhode Island have launched their own initiatives to increase use of public space. We're also making an additional $1 million of our stimulus money available to municipalities and community organizations to fund initiatives that make it easier to do business outside. This could be anything from heat lamps, tents, and outdoor WiFi systems to bike racks, tables, chairs, outdoor lighting and more. We need to give our local businesses every tool possible to keep the lights on while we combat this pandemic. If you or someone you know needs help with their small business, please reach out to us at (401) 521-HELP or e-mail mailto:info@commerceri.com. We're all in this together, -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

subject: we’re in the last lap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Nancy has proven to the country that she’s willing to throw us under the bus in order to advance an agenda that Americans don’t want... | |

[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=c08bc56543cc49b78da6b44fae7f3f19&_e=r4fRfGTKw11F8NssH7-qClasbSpRScgHhni1gVZVKTmCajT1Ao11h37CCM6nWHBMjwKnQ9hwnbC5pZSXbzjwJ54Da0iCPoOa1nl0H4sR0PCLP40d7rnwgq6lLoOtGvBe7i5Xm2ZUB9T5LnzAbGg8lj5h8aka2uWsNVO-Z-twvft_XHEB-3wFr034Vq7Zb9M3z5XOhrkiXO7DVi37C7Ko0PIhfEkFAWH7yw1aFGvKvd_5fqOgFK7bfAkdURKm1ap0sBX-TVfgXr08j6s_5uSVeh6vO6vs10dEyM8liSKzjveJEIpzhE6MRsTzIWav44EB4KS5sW-_zNJwvYo13N6_AE8BqVCDqCncQU0kv-ibT-_K-v5EkEULc1CIjV8REICc1VVcuLUhyXXW_Dv6m5fKwJEiEWwYxZl4y6tzvDzBir4gH5LAGmvGoldhuRdsSQ99aVoT11o2z7v8Us6wCTAxgn5HP-PfO2TxexX4D117klc%3D)

Friend,

We’ve come a long way in this race – but with just **47 days** left, we need to push harder than ever before if we’re going to come out on top this Election Day.

I’ve spent months crisscrossing Illinois talking with voters, business owners, farmers, and workers just like you who understand the challenges that America is facing better than any politician claims to understand.

_We talked about the threats that China poses to our economy, the threats that rising taxes pose to businesses and families, and the threats that the Left’s anti-police crusade poses to our communities._

Americans are looking for strong leadership that won’t shy away from addressing those challenges, and that’s why we can’t afford to let Nancy Pelosi hold onto Congress for two more years.

_Time and time again, Nancy has proven to the country that she’s willing to throw us under the bus in order to advance an agenda that Americans don’t want – and can’t afford._

She’s turned her back on the police who serve our communities in favor of the mobs who would rather tear them down.

She’s turned her back on our nation’s security by refusing to treat the Chinese Communist Party like the adversary that it is.

She’s turned her back on American workers by denying them crucial COVID economic relief time and time again as she plays petty political games.

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Infrastructure in the pole position
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Holcomb is committed to keeping us in the pole position when it comes to infrastructure. | |
---
|
---
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=e18ecb9abe0541358cb6baea6661fcbd&_e=UdLrmkA6diaShLAtLbU-94Mlqm46Lo5ziugrHo2Hx6O8CpidLv5iu_0Gl_pt7pFhXAFfqnqeJx_UHPZOM5SDwrDY-QRyRuZUrNSzWgFfg0TSJbBntZx9VojHPpcki-2xd40ooA36oOxHiBMSVE4TbfazB2MOG0DR_WZ8wqZ23f9q7YT9O5ifxg1YoAeP6oZrSm_-Y1O4PTNJ2kyul2wiyGMGhNIO1bPSrGSvX9ryGKJ9zUTuVALSisHlNb3RF6FZgofPuBYy8hGtkPdXb2nUzWUm7FnPT5OCxyfwZg3lh8ROlb1OjgP0AiybPShSLZOp-fGy0ZevjBNVLcbJKqDavdKaEUg8vOUeu64RBr8Ls5uxB6QaZY3qNazFwGwLUWjaujQ9r-STsCs5duBqjRywUJG6z5hgaDoh25aGqRfcnqtTCxnHVstnKa4soOIRrHRqx7xojtNhxvRoFbpogDGv0A%3D%3D)
Friends,

Governor Holcomb mentioned it yesterday, and we will tell you it again today – Hoosiers are getting out and about at almost the same rate we were before the pandemic.

And one place we are seeing the most movement again is on our roads. Traffic is down just 13% compared to early this year.

**After all****, we’re the Crossroads of America and Governor Holcomb is committed to keeping us in the pole position when it comes to infrastructure.**

That’s why Governor Holcomb announced that the state’s incredibly popular local road funding program is back! The Community Crossings Matching Grant Program assists local communities in the repair, ongoing maintenance, and improvement of their roads and bridges – making sure Hoosiers’ first and last miles of their days are durable and safe.

In the last two years, $738.3 million has been invested into local projects throughout all 92 counties. $120 million of that was invested early this year alone. And the funding does not stop there.

Is there a road or bridge in your _local community_ that still needs to be fixed? This program can help. The second Community Crossings call of 2020 is now moving forward.

Here are some dates you need to know:
* Sept. 25, 2020 – Application period opens
* Oct. 23, 2020 – Application period ends
* November 2020 – Awards announced

Keep up-to-date with the **[latest information about Community Crossings grants.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=e18ecb9abe0541358cb6baea6661fcbd&_e=UdLrmkA6diaShLAtLbU-94Mlqm46Lo5ziugrHo2Hx6O8CpidLv5iu_0Gl_pt7pFhXAFfqnqeJx_UHPZOM5SDwrDY-QRyRuZUrNSzWgFfg0TSJbBntZx9VojHPpcki-2xd40ooA36oOxHiBMSVE4TbfazB2MOG0DR_WZ8wqZ23f9q7YT9O5ifxg1YoAeP6oZrSm_-Y1O4PTNJ2kyul2wiyGMGhNIO1bPSrGSvX9ryGKJ9zUTuVALSisHlNb3RF6FZfCI5_v_se4_X5HmBU52NDL8hZdHve68y1z9lBxSwR8B5OVcp7WeVMpD8ckoH9NX9xXVy3gwRMv6b0HHicp0QDt_6Olh9R1uDToS8DUL1hWtVbxyxvW5dbfFO1GIYPdBirgCRuN5eTM0AEYiLfSN59fym14JmVKxD_I7JxpVg8zYFovoUEcJLqgpLyJquP_ltAD2OwkRfUf6PUPHMl0wp3g%3D%3D)**

Communities large and small across the state are evenly feeling the positive impacts of these roads and bridge investments. It’s towns like Mauckport along the Ohio River in Southern Indiana with a population of less than 100 people. They received $100,000 and are seeing 3 miles of road improved – and your community could be next.

Governor Holcomb knows that our state can only be supported when every community is supported. This is a team sport, and together we’ve got Indiana in the fast lane for continued recovery and growth.

#BackOnTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew
---
---
|
|

name: J.D.'s iPhone
subject: Nothing beats your own bed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,

After hitting six more counties last week, I finally got to sleep in my own bed last night. Don't get me wrong, I love sleeping in Sioux City Sue in RV parks across the district, but nothing beats the feeling of your own bed.

I'm back in Sioux City for the next couple of days while we’re planning the next leg of the tour, so I figured I'd give you all an update.

Things are going great. We've officially passed the halfway mark of the Every Town Tour, going to all 374 towns in Iowa's 4th district (while visiting Pioneer, Iowa, we found out that it became unincorporated last year so the 375 town tour has turned into the 374 town tour!)

I've really enjoyed our parking lot rallies like the ones we held this past week in Mason City and Fort Dodge. Our campaign is all about getting out to the people and bringing new people into this campaign so I'm very glad that we can continue to run this campaign our way while keeping people safe and healthy.

In each town, we do something different. Maybe it's delivering a yard sign, stopping into a local grain elevator, touring a local business, or buying lunch from a local community grocery store. But every stop is important because I get the opportunity to listen and learn from the people I'm asking to serve.

**This campaign isn't about me and it isn't about my opponent -- it's about who will fight to make sure rural Iowa isn't left behind. Thanks to all of you, I'm in this fight armed with the voices of our district and I'll be able to get to work on Day 1 in Congress.**

While we're over halfway on the Every Town Tour, we're under halfway to our mid-month fundraising goal. [**If you're in a spot to help by chipping in $5, we'll put it right in the gas tank or towards some more PPE for the trip.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19240525/252346430/986988776?refcode=em20_200917_mm1_inact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmRjZmY0NS0yNGY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-AhFhZtvzVI6MZ7kHhSe9O3pw4ueJPvwoYHSvUSy0vw=)

clean_body: Peter, After hitting six more counties last week, I finally got to sleep in my own bed last night. Don't get me wrong, I love sleeping in Sioux City Sue in RV parks across the district, but nothing beats the feeling of your own bed. I'm back in Sioux City for the next couple of days while we’re planning the next leg of the tour, so I figured I'd give you all an update. Things are going great. We've officially passed the halfway mark of the Every Town Tour, going to all 374 towns in Iowa's 4th district (while visiting Pioneer, Iowa, we found out that it became unincorporated last year so the 375 town tour has turned into the 374 town tour!) I've really enjoyed our parking lot rallies like the ones we held this past week in Mason City and Fort Dodge. Our campaign is all about getting out to the people and bringing new people into this campaign so I'm very glad that we can continue to run this campaign our way while keeping people safe and healthy. In each town, we do something different. Maybe it's delivering a yard sign, stopping into a local grain elevator, touring a local business, or buying lunch from a local community grocery store. But every stop is important because I get the opportunity to listen and learn from the people I'm asking to serve. This campaign isn't about me and it isn't about my opponent -- it's about who will fight to make sure rural Iowa isn't left behind. Thanks to all of you, I'm in this fight armed with the voices of our district and I'll be able to get to work on Day 1 in Congress. While we're over halfway on the Every Town Tour, we're under halfway to our mid-month fundraising goal. = You can use this link here to help out: = Standing Tall for All, J.D. Sent from my iPhone

body:

---
Friend,

**CNBC rates Jon Ossoff's race as one of the most important races for deciding control of the Senate!**

_This is what we have been saying all along._ We know that if Jon wins in Georgia, the Democrats win the Senate.

**[_Jon's opponent, corrupt GOP Senator David Perdue, is on a sinking ship._ Chip in $20 now to unseat Perdue and send Jon Ossoff to the United States Senate >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e285d/5b2c1286/39ca1592/25f32eec/3265625997/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_16_cnbc?refcode=em_2020_09_16_cnbc&amount=20")**

---

Instead of putting Georgians first and keeping them safe at the beginning of the pandemic, David Perdue was focused on lining his own pockets.

Friend, Perdue failed the people of Georgia -- and Georgians are taking notice.

Georgians are sick and tired of this corruption in Washington, and they know that Jon Ossoff will clean it up and fight for the people.

Jon is leading in the polls and has all the momentum in this race.

name: Mark Warner
subject: RE: Announcing our Pig Roast special guests
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Dr. Jill Biden will be joining us tonight!
|
---

| | Hi, Derek --

Wanted to make sure you saw my team's note yesterday! I hope you can join me for this "almost-annual" tradition tonight. I'm looking forward to our virtual event and excited to talk with our special guests about why it's so important that everyone gets out to vote this year.

Hope to see you tonight at 5:30 PM ET! **[You can sign up here.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dad9/53d9897e/55e87160/1c880eeb/3264444205/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfJltpXguuWrFidYFZOjWlRj37JkuXkTM5953wasShfuLMCog/viewform")**

-- Mark Warner
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Team Warner**
Subject: Announcing our Pig Roast special guests
> Friends --
>
> Mark Warner's semi-annual Pig Roast is happening **tomorrow at 5:30 PM ET** , and we'd love for you to join us! We're taking this Virginia tradition online this year for a video call where Mark and some of his friends will talk about all the ways Virginians can cast their ballots this year.
>
> We're excited for the first virtual pig roast, and all of the guests who will be joining us, including:
> * Dr. Jill Biden;
> * Virginia Senator Tim Kaine;
> * New Jersey Senator Cory Booker;
> * Representative Elaine Luria (VA-02);
> * Representative Abigail Spanberger (VA-07); and
> * Representative Bobby Scott (VA-03).
>
We'd love for you to join the party! If you plan to attend this free, virtual event, **[please RSVP using this link.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dad9/53d9897e/55e87160/1c880eeb/3264444205/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfJltpXguuWrFidYFZOjWlRj37JkuXkTM5953wasShfuLMCog/viewform")**
>
> We hope to see you on Thursday!
>
> -- Team Warner | [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dad9/53d9897e/55e87160/1c880eea/3264444205/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc4OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200917_e_1_fl__788__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
> ---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dad9/53d9897e/55e87160/1c880ee9/3264444205/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Bill Olson
subject: Thugs have no respect for the law
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gx89nPB6OF6OuRU&b=yRaiYXjMuiPKlEAjQHpEmw

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I spent 27 years in the U.S, Army, and I will not stand by while armed liberal execution mobs target police! I will not let the media's concocted lies about police supposedly being racist excuse the execution-style leftist targeting of cops!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gx89nPB6OF6OuRU&b=yRaiYXjMuiPKlEAjQHpEmw

The far-Left media has whipped the Leftist rioters into such a frenzy that they think they are justified in carrying out execution-style murders of innocent cops.

Two Los Angeles County sheriff's deputies are fighting for their lives after they were shot multiple times at point-blank range in an ambush, authorities said.

Crowds of protesters blocked the entrance to St. Francis Medical Center in Lynwood, where the wounded officers were in a critical condition, police said. Some protesters chanted "we hope they die," the Los Angeles County Sheriff's Office said on Twitter. A witness told ABC7 that some had tried to break into the hospital's emergency room.

The shooting happened at around 7 p.m. Saturday at the Metro Blue Line station at Willowbrook Avenue and Compton Boulevard, not far from the Compton sheriff's station.

The Los Angeles County Sheriff's department shared video of the incident in a post on Twitter that shows a person open fire through the passenger-side window of the patrol car in Compton.

That's not all. It wasn't just that a bunch of murderous social justice warriors tried to kill innocent police officers.

A violent mob of woke liberals also blocked the emergency entrances to a hospital to ensure the deputies that were shot would die.

In a tweet late on Saturday night, the sheriff's department said protesters were blocking the entrance and exit to the hospital the wounded deputies were at.

"To the protesters blocking the entrance & exit of the HOSPITAL EMERGENCY ROOM yelling "We hope they die" referring to 2 LA Sheriff's ambushed today in #Compton: DO NOT BLOCK EMERGENCY ENTRIES & EXITS TO THE HOSPITAL," the tweet said. "People's lives are at stake when ambulances can't get through."

The sheriff's department later said deputies had issued a dispersal order for an unlawful assembly.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gx89nPB6OF6OuRU&b=yRaiYXjMuiPKlEAjQHpEmw

Is this the America we know and want? A violent mob of Leftists trying to make sure people they shot actually die?

This is California. It's place that has long lost its way, full of hateful and spiteful far-Left ideologues.

Murderers.

I think President Trump should declare the state a disaster and take over its governance. It is clear these people have no self control or ability to protect their own people.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gx89nPB6OF6OuRU&b=yRaiYXjMuiPKlEAjQHpEmw

It is abundantly clear- the far-Left actively hates us and wants to harm us. And that is who controls the Democrat party.

Here's the good news: The American people see this. They are rallying behind our American President- and that includes military and veterans like me!

If we don't want the murderous gangs of the far Left to have power, we MUST win this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gx89nPB6OF6OuRU&b=yRaiYXjMuiPKlEAjQHpEmw

Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". The last time she did this, Steve Scalise got shot by one of her followers! We have to fight if we don't want to be treated like this!

I have taken an oath to the United States Constitution, defending her against all foes foreign OR domestic! I am a veteran and a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gx89nPB6OF6OuRU&b=yRaiYXjMuiPKlEAjQHpEmw

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the media!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gx89nPB6OF6OuRU&b=yRaiYXjMuiPKlEAjQHpEmw

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gx89nPB6OF6OuRU&b=yRaiYXjMuiPKlEAjQHpEmw
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gx89nPB6OF6OuRU&b=yRaiYXjMuiPKlEAjQHpEmw
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gx89nPB6OF6OuRU&b=yRaiYXjMuiPKlEAjQHpEmw

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gx89nPB6OF6OuRU&b=yRaiYXjMuiPKlEAjQHpEmw

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gx89nPB6OF6OuRU&b=yRaiYXjMuiPKlEAjQHpEmw
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gx89nPB6OF6OuRU&b=yRaiYXjMuiPKlEAjQHpEmw
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

Democrat Lois Frankel has been a politician for 34 YEARS,
including eight years in Congress.

She’s been in Washington for so long, that like a monarch

like the rest of us.

Each election year, Frankel talks to talk: Medicare, Social
Security, prescription drug prices, etc., etc., etc.,

But as soon as she’s comfortably back into office, she takes a
big nap from the interests of her constituents.
