name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: The Jobs Candidate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends, Today my record earned me the endorsement of the National Federation of Independent Businesses, the largest small business association in the USA.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=303A485A1A6439)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

Government impacts the everyday aspects of people's lives, whether it be the economy, public safety issues, burdensome regulations, or taxes. I’m proud to be on the right side of those issues, and of my record fighting for families, employees, and small businesses here in our community.

Today my record earned me the endorsement of the [National Federation of Independent Businesses](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=303A485A1A6440), the largest small business association in the USA.
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=303A485A1A6440)
---
| | |
---
| | [ HELP US WIN → ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=303A485A1A6441)
---
| | |
---
| | In the State Legislature, I:

* Helped deliver the lowest corporate tax rate in decades;

* Eliminated the MTA Payroll tax that was hurting small businesses;

* Eliminated the sales tax on clothing purchases under $110 and voted against tax increases over 350 times;

* Voted against burdensome regulation draining small businesses;

* Garnered support for President Trump’s U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement

* Fought high tolls and and am leading the fight against high property taxes; and

* Am working diligently to reopen New York’s economy safely

In Congress, I will continue supporting a pro-growth, pro-jobs agenda to help our economy recover from COVID and restore American jobs lost during the pandemic.

[With 47 days until the election, it is more evident than ever that this election will be about whether we are going to preserve the American dream or whether we are going to go down a path of socialism. Help me renew the American Dream, its limitless potential and opportunity.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=303A485A1A6442)

| | | | |

subject: Our 2020 vote pledge >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
We don't need to tell you how much is on the line this November. This is -- without a doubt -- the most consequential election in recent memory.

That means we need every eligible person to turn out and vote on or before November 3rd. We're aiming to have 5,000 people sign our vote pledge by the end of this week.

So, if you know you'll be voting in the 2020 general election, ADD YOUR NAME to our 2020 vote pledge today >>

Want to sign our voter pledge but unsure if you're registered to vote? You can check your California voter registration status by following this link >>

>From climate change, to health care, to police reform and more, the future of our country is riding on people turning up and exercising their right to vote this election season.

Make sure your voice is heard | PLEDGE TO VOTE >>

Thank you!

-- Sánchez HQ

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

body:

| Peter,

Today, I released a new ad that honors all women who’ve made their voices heard.

I’m proud of my grandmother, Calvert, for being the first woman elected to the Dallas City Council in 1957. She inspires me to [work hard, be bold, and be honest - exactly what Congress needs more of today.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=0cf95f2b11&e=68aaeb0998)

Click below to watch my latest TV ad, "Calvert."
---
| [ ](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=69fd095865&e=68aaeb0998 "Genevieve Collins - "Calvert"")
---
| We need elected representatives who believe there should be less government in business, but more business in government. I have created jobs, balanced budgets, and worked hand-in-hand with our local school districts and students.

[If you agree that it's time for a new direction, help us keep our latest TV ad on the air with a donation of $2,800, $1,000, $500, or whatever you are able.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=7b437bb9dd&e=68aaeb0998) Every dollar helps, and no amount is too small!

| [While I've spent ](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=e517fa8971&e=68aaeb0998)[my career working for solutions, my opponent has become part of the progressive Washington e](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=d735512a81&e=68aaeb0998)[stablishment](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=abd0e334c7&e=68aaeb0998), voting 93% of the time with AOC, and 100% of the time with Nancy Pelosi.

With a record like that, he's not going to help solve the problems that we face as a nation. [I know that the voters of the 32nd district are ready for a change.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=db6ccc4494&e=68aaeb0998) It's time for bold, honest leadership.

name: MaxRoseForCongress.com
subject: A video has been shared with dpwillis67@gmail.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Max Rose For Congress
body:
Yesterday, Max joined Jake Tapper on CNN to talk about what Americans deserve from leaders in Washington in the next coronavirus relief bill
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/i8n_FB-OQoYY798VDnkNQYF6h2AtYh-Sd8YYp2i7oYM=/70sA1b0GDtaGSkyTlX_HMX54ODn7NRVeuR1XF5QdXP4=?refcode=em_info_2020.09.17_b1_mrfccom_conole&amount=25)
---
| Team --

Yesterday, Max joined Jake Tapper on _CNN_ to talk about what Americans deserve from leaders in Washington in the next coronavirus relief bill: state and local aid, jobless benefits, support for small businesses, and a new round of stimulus checks.

**As Max said, this is an opportunity for Washington to show the nation that when leaders from both sides of the aisle come together, government works -- and we can achieve bold results.**

[**That 's why he's urging politicians to put aside their partisan allegiances and put the people first. Watch the _CNN_ clip below to check out Max's message on the political games Mitch McConnell and party leaders have been playing. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/i8n_FB-OQoYY798VDnkNQYF6h2AtYh-Sd8YYp2i7oYM=/8yIqGijOyhwbG_u4LNm2uegDutHUbgjavyLyVFI4sC0=?v=Kqy_Z9uLGuk&feature=youtu.be) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/i8n_FB-OQoYY798VDnkNQYF6h2AtYh-Sd8YYp2i7oYM=/8yIqGijOyhwbG_u4LNm2uegDutHUbgjavyLyVFI4sC0=?v=Kqy_Z9uLGuk&feature=youtu.be) | [CLICK TO WATCH »](https://act.myngp.com/el/i8n_FB-OQoYY798VDnkNQYF6h2AtYh-Sd8YYp2i7oYM=/8yIqGijOyhwbG_u4LNm2uegDutHUbgjavyLyVFI4sC0=?v=Kqy_Z9uLGuk&feature=youtu.be)

**The single most effective way to encourage a voter to support Mark is by hearing from other supporters like YOU!** Whether this is your first time helping a campaign or if you’ve been doing it for years, we’ll take the time to walk through it with you to ensure you have everything you need to have a great time and follow COVID-19 safe practices. If you have questions ahead of time, please contact me at [_info@markronchetti.com_](mailto:info@markronchetti.com?subject=Sleeves Rolled Up Saturday&body=)!

clean_body: | | | | Peter, We asked yesterday and we still need you. Are you signed up yet for Mark Ronchetti’s Sleeves-Rolled-Up Saturday? In two days on Saturday, September 19th, our team will hold its first Sleeves Rolled Up Saturday of the campaign. Already, over 100 people have signed up to participate. Across the state, supporters will be safely and responsibly knocking on doors and making calls to support Mark’s campaign. Our team set an ambitious goal to talk to 25,000 voters in one day. Time is running out and to reach the goal, we need your help! -- The single most effective way to encourage a voter to support Mark is by hearing from other supporters like YOU! Whether this is your first time helping a campaign or if you’ve been doing it for years, we’ll take the time to walk through it with you to ensure you have everything you need to have a great time and follow COVID-19 safe practices. If you have questions ahead of time, please contact me at mailto:info@markronchetti.com?subject=Sleeves Rolled Up Saturday&body=! WE NEED YOU to STAND UP to Ben Ray Lujan and his liberal allies in New York and California - who have already spent over a million dollars attacking Mark and his family with flat-out lies! IT’S UP TO US TO SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT WITH VOTERS. We need supporters from across the state to fight with us and talk to voters about why this race is so important. We need your help to tell New Mexico about Mark! We hope we can count on you! Jeff Glassburner Campaign Manager Mark Ronchetti for New Mexico PS: Every day counts and every door we knock on or call we make gets us one voter closer to victory! Jon's momentum is undeniable |

Friend,

**Jon Ossoff 's momentum is undeniable -- _even Breitbart knows it!!!_**

Just last week, Breitbart, the radical far-right site, admitted that Jon is beating David Perdue.

_And this is coming on the heels of Fox News (!!!) recognizing Perdue 's struggles and pegging Jon's race as one of the most important for deciding control of the Senate._

That's why Mitch McConnell and his allies are spending $35 MILLION to stop Jon and save their majority.

They are SCARED of Jon winning in Georgia and securing a Democratic majority in the Senate.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Elisa=20Cardnell?=
subject: Moms for MJ
body:
Texas Democratic Party invited several military veterans to speak regarding the president’s recent remarks about the military. | | | |
---
| [Chip in ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=ceeda4c187&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in ")
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

Yesterday the Texas Democratic Party invited several military veterans to speak regarding the president’s recent remarks about the military and John Cornyn’s (lack of) response. MJ Hegar is running to flip that US Senate seat. The veterans who spoke included our very own Executive Director. Here is her statement:

My name is Elisa Cardnell. I live in Houston and I’m a recent Congressional candidate in Texas-02. I come from a family with a long history of serving our country. I was born on an Army base in West Germany because that’s where my dad was stationed at the time. My brother is currently stationed in Korea with the Air Force. And I served for 11 years in the Navy, both active duty and as a Reservist. I deployed to the Persian Gulf on a destroyer as the anti-submarine warfare officer. I would still be in the Reserves today except that a medical board determined that I had too many pre-existing conditions to continue to serve.

**As a disabled veteran, with an 80% rating from the VA, I know what it means to serve. It takes courage, discipline, and integrity. Service means putting people over politics and country over party. **

The president’s remarks are part of a long pattern of disrespectful behavior towards our military - from his irrational hatred for John McCain to his attempts to use active-duty troops to quash political protests. The current commander-in-chief truly doesn’t understand service, and clearly demonstrates his disdain for our military and veterans. When Republican politicians remain silent or issue empty and belated platitudes in response, it shows that **they lack the courage and integrity necessary for public service.**

John Cornyn has again failed veterans and Texas. He does not serve anyone except his own self-interests and those of his corporate donors. **It’s time to can Cornyn and vote for MJ.**

MJ Hegar is a mom with young children and a veteran who honorably served our country. **Texas is a battleground state - will you help fight to flip Texas blue?**

****

[Chip in now!](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=955d15c504&e=3f151f8b74)

Thank you for all that you do!

**Elisa Cardnell**
Executive Director, Moms in Office
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Jaime Harrison is tied with Lindsey Graham in South Carolina -- can you pitch in to help make sure he wins this Senate seat?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Yesterday, we got some terrific news: A new poll showed that Jaime Harrison is tied, 48% to 48%, with his Republican incumbent opponent, Lindsey Graham. And today, Jaime announced that grassroots dono | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251ae/45c30650/1c06f70a3/66e8f3e9/2266609745/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
A couple of months ago, I was honored to endorse Jaime Harrison -- a champion for working people who's running for Senate in South Carolina.

Yesterday, we got some terrific news: **A new poll showed that Jaime Harrison is _tied_ , 48% to 48%, with his Republican incumbent opponent, Lindsey Graham.**

And today, Jaime announced that grassroots donors helped raise over **$1 million** in the first 24 hours after its release.

That's fantastic. But I know this team can help push that number even higher.

**[If you're able to, will you split a donation of $2 or whatever you can between Jaime Harrison and Warren Democrats? Your contribution today would help keep up the momentum and put Jaime Harrison over the top in this powerfully important Senate race.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251ae/45c30650/1c06f70a3/66e8f3e8/2266609745/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWpoIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVYxNEZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwOTE3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jh?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV14F_EGR_END_E_20200917_V1S2_P")**

Jaime Harrison is fighting from the heart to bring new and bold leadership to the United States Senate.

Born and raised in rural South Carolina, he has lived the struggles so many in the Palmetto State face every single day. But despite the odds that were stacked against him, he worked hard, overcame challenges at every turn, and gave back to the community that raised him.

His deep empathy, character, and integrity make him the leader that South Carolinians deserve in the United States Senate. That is why I'm proud to endorse him and to stand shoulder to shoulder with him in the fight to build a better future for South Carolinians and Americans across the country.

It's clear: we've got a real shot to win this race and help make sure Democrats take back the Senate. **I'm going to do everything I can to help elect Jaime Harrison, but I can't do it alone. As a grassroots movement, side by side, we can power him to victory.**

**[Your support would go a long way in a race this tight. If you can, please split a donation to help make sure Jaime Harrison wins, and help elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251ae/45c30650/1c06f70a3/66e8f3e8/2266609745/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWpoIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVYxNEZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwOTE3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jh?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV14F_EGR_END_E_20200917_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

subject: See what Nancy said on her last day in the Statehouse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
This week marked Nancy’s last speech in the South Carolina Statehouse, and we were blown away by her powerful words. Find out what she said. | |
---
[ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=7491dc0f35b8430794bf638f70fa423e&_e=QONzMPelS8vGSEyJfDQnUsmEcU1GiaZ84eLAAw5WErrnv2GIGgTZEwRtKKODDSw0kVMLWZ9ufgnc5gMkNdf6f4tocFdhxk8WZxo3S1K05_eqP_m6nyfiJmOLToFUgF_Jw5QUak1ZQ6JrG2jkzJPI3dt_RgY-HTrIQd6r3nbaga_PMoaRXEDTCYrOP7hw_UwDXZacFLl7LQyTtYskSmJ6W9u3ijgV502UP_7YbvuBCPZgclGEYGGeeeT3lLZ_KvDUYvu5240CSq7XlmTxG5JlaFFMfAqYOAqgHY6DEVHnLOHF8rKGrm6rJ9hNlirt6Rkj_4wTY6Q1FCQ5Ntgq0NT5kkBRGMI8g3jinSqxTqiPgGD3kERZNAr_iGqEKRYP2FXouuEBN6VnJ4LZAFcsXf6Xa99QjqtT6UlE-bOVv9OZ4GzHbbzzSa4TPjhoMRFG5BqCVqXkkQHSrEPmS0SoAGkVYw%3D%3D)
|
---
Friend,

_This week marked Nancy’s last speech in the South Carolina Statehouse, and we were blown away by her powerful words._
_**“We are at a tremendous crossroads right now. We can make the decision to bail on the American experiment and the American dream, but I know that is not the direction our nation needs to go.”**_
[ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=7491dc0f35b8430794bf638f70fa423e&_e=QONzMPelS8vGSEyJfDQnUsmEcU1GiaZ84eLAAw5WErrnv2GIGgTZEwRtKKODDSw0kVMLWZ9ufgnc5gMkNdf6f4tocFdhxk8WZxo3S1K05_eqP_m6nyfiJmOLToFUgF_Jw5QUak1ZQ6JrG2jkzJPI3dt_RgY-HTrIQd6r3nbaga_PMoaRXEDTCYrOP7hw_UwDXZacFLl7LQyTtYskSmJ6W9u3ijgV502UP_7YbvuBCPZgclGEYGGeeeT3lLZ_KvDU_R5sabbwK-jOmSxBAxT4YzqJVL3x-LUUomAbNzNmHpnw6vZ4CyYZtW8tAqLnholw7dintr7tWBOlLn2cJbXDQIBpTjkoC8cMbsp6Zd99PLS4YMaI7UEvnWbIP8ld87egbIAi6EM0Zryc7IQ8Biht22NRlHHaCeO8RewKRsx1qgHgRGX3ZQG0kDMVA1KDXShsILPlVI4prnHZYaQO0kYwsw%3D%3D)
[**Watch Nancy’s Speech**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=7491dc0f35b8430794bf638f70fa423e&_e=QONzMPelS8vGSEyJfDQnUsmEcU1GiaZ84eLAAw5WErrnv2GIGgTZEwRtKKODDSw0kVMLWZ9ufgnc5gMkNdf6f4tocFdhxk8WZxo3S1K05_eqP_m6nyfiJmOLToFUgF_Jw5QUak1ZQ6JrG2jkzJPI3dt_RgY-HTrIQd6r3nbaga_PMoaRXEDTCYrOP7hw_UwDXZacFLl7LQyTtYskSmJ6W9u3ijgV502UP_7YbvuBCPZgclGEYGGeeeT3lLZ_KvDUL55H3DelvQ4unhkQg09rlflCwigO6BNmhduRihuv8NE2iKsK6fmfFogtiu-EN7Up-LLTmJt2EmurVFh9e2-zA0bYRcdwkYvbNyO0hY5HBOEvPUn6aDegHKsh5PPvszVvy7gxgsst8rgqh7dewsxSfIWWOb6rAY-l5KlSg14z2HnjMVvvEMuKOyojcYNmykJjAnDBbRFubr-bKOWNlHMqzw%3D%3D)
_Nancy laid out in no uncertain terms the choice that Americans are facing in 2020. The stakes are extremely high, and that’s a big reason why Nancy decided to leave the Statehouse and run for Congress in the first place. _

_**As Nancy said, we’re facing a decision between “freedom, or the government being responsible for all” and “safety and security, or anarchy.”**_

But 2020 isn’t the only subject she touched on.

She also spoke about her own personal story and her passionate belief in expanding access to the American Dream that she lived firsthand.
_**“Your ZIP code, your job, your income level should not determine how well you are educated or your job opportunities when you graduate from school.”**_
[**Watch Nancy’s Speech**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=7491dc0f35b8430794bf638f70fa423e&_e=QONzMPelS8vGSEyJfDQnUsmEcU1GiaZ84eLAAw5WErrnv2GIGgTZEwRtKKODDSw0kVMLWZ9ufgnc5gMkNdf6f4tocFdhxk8WZxo3S1K05_eqP_m6nyfiJmOLToFUgF_Jw5QUak1ZQ6JrG2jkzJPI3dt_RgY-HTrIQd6r3nbaga_PMoaRXEDTCYrOP7hw_UwDXZacFLl7LQyTtYskSmJ6W9u3ijgV502UP_7YbvuBCPZgclGEYGGeeeT3lLZ_KvDUSm6pY6N-mwwVWbl5_LyIwMHTAJ98z-2zBKns4DLAm55iPn-1tD5i3WDeO_kZJkvXxHacFEawZYVIkE51BVnY_sy_T5Tp8osJ5kALm-xtUm3CeNbusQkYNTJk77PGdmS5QSc_lGRuZbt4G2iRmfW2NT8mry5KB-SOsOcS8zgnQpg1nbq-RJUxFGt0kdSH1qv6zsZpQ3aAqCpDjHhXWglVwQ%3D%3D)
And she thanked the most important members of her team (Miles and Eli) for being her biggest supporters and putting up with her hectic campaign schedule.

Friend, it was one of the best speeches we’ve ever seen Nancy give, and we encourage you to watch it in full below.
[**Watch Nancy’s Speech**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=7491dc0f35b8430794bf638f70fa423e&_e=QONzMPelS8vGSEyJfDQnUsmEcU1GiaZ84eLAAw5WErrnv2GIGgTZEwRtKKODDSw0kVMLWZ9ufgnc5gMkNdf6f4tocFdhxk8WZxo3S1K05_eqP_m6nyfiJmOLToFUgF_Jw5QUak1ZQ6JrG2jkzJPI3dt_RgY-HTrIQd6r3nbaga_PMoaRXEDTCYrOP7hw_UwDXZacFLl7LQyTtYskSmJ6W9u3ijgV502UP_7YbvuBCPZgclGEYGGeeeT3lLZ_KvDUcvgHlTo0isXTKVxqOIf5fL0Veq5GmMSqMbkd_MV1AduiyQFWqvNVP-M4TjdLxy8ksXSCaro21VtC5ZL_opamPaUCgzqAsis3b53BmzhJHBftjw1-c9bHCDSeTif0bV9vlEp45U5n85OC-4LyAvqCiKkBhYYBaIYnw-uZrU8eci2yClrXpSXY6hQMItp-AfE2Kf-GPzvjDTseJOkPmn_WLA%3D%3D)
Thank you for your support,

Team Mace
---
[**Donate Today**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=7491dc0f35b8430794bf638f70fa423e&_e=QONzMPelS8vGSEyJfDQnUpN7o3OtPdFK-myGzEpFvDelwRJJDCkH_UILSdMIIVUa4F0XktMWybQS_miRKo6b9MsEOk6zKBt9gAk9gf1TagyV9kMEcvXyE2bSKHydopeu2OEOqipwHyB-l5TZz7qumBcyBbf8DOmgAIvy3qZ5bUqoi3JK_kPbnCIt13sUPhS8g80PxAkXXy3_gnzHyMEh0aggqosprIR_ly9GgYtJc3HTG7F1dYGNRLZBIRwYP1qt7Oi1G-w7raZUqCszdpZpkdXTZUpAVgUYYHN1bf_TZvqL2y2Bvs5jTLszayyaSYy1XPAK4PtKjNYtW3lFP-PAAFUCYgTmGjKI27DcW6b5nBt7Lbd1yz7zukfp2EzBBtoRdBbvHA8P9A9Ux56wmLSPkCMam0P2GbcsHKsNFPIvpDpR1xC8PsQ3dhl82JXRZexoG0pvjd5t7Xf7OOdXZ3SpasVOZIseXpPh9MM72qEim5Q%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump: 'Our youth will be taught to love America with all of their heart'
body:
President Trump is fighting each day against the left’s attempts to indoctrinate our children with a radical, misleading, and unpatriotic story... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9d6a0b756c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 17, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump: ‘Our youth will be taught to love America with all of their heart** ’

**President Trump** is fighting each day against the left’s attempts to indoctrinate our children with a radical, misleading, and unpatriotic story of America.

**Divisive and distorted histories** of our country—everything from Howard Zinn’s _A People’s History of the United States_ to _The New York Times’_ 1619 Project—seek to erase America’s tradition of liberty, free expression, and self-determination from memory.

**For too long** , the left has been winning that fight. For example, even though the 1619 Project has been criticized as inaccurate by multiple prominent historians, it already has been quietly disseminated in 4,500 classrooms across the United States.

🎬 [**President Trump: We must stop the lies in America’s classrooms**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23f8182e7e&e=3ee4985eea)

**Today marks 233 years** since the signing of our U.S. Constitution. To honor this Constitution Day, President Trump spoke at the White House Conference on American History held today at the National Archives building in Washington, D.C. The event brought together scholars to address the way some have distorted American history.

**“Our Constitution** was the product of centuries of tradition, wisdom, and experience,” President Trump said. “No political document has done more to advance the human condition or propel the engine of progress.”

**The President** also announced today that he would sign an executive order launching the “1776 Commission,” which will promote patriotic education for our students. The commission will encourage educators to make plans to celebrate the 250th birthday of America’s founding, as well.

**Earlier this month,** President Trump [**banned Federal agencies**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ba5707459&e=3ee4985eea) from using taxpayer dollars to fund divisive, anti-American employee training programs.

**“American parents** are not going to accept indoctrination in our schools, cancel culture in our work, or the repression of traditional faith, culture, and values in the public square,” the President said today.

**When left-wing mobs** tear down statues of our Founding Fathers, burn small businesses to the ground, and [**attack law enforcement officers daily**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=835eb0df81&e=3ee4985eea)—all with barely a peep from Democrat politicians—it is clear we are witnessing the results of decades of left-wing indoctrination in our schools, universities, and news media.

**“We are here today** to declare that we will never submit to tyranny,” President Trump told those gathered at the National Archives today.

**“We will reclaim our history** and our country for citizens of every race, color, religion, and creed.”

🎬 [**No American should be made to feel ashamed of their history**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f864a0394&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 [**Watch President Trump’s full Constitution Day speech here!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ac1fc6da62&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Statement From Laura Loomer On Constitution Day And Citizenship Day
body:
While America’s Constitution was ratified on June 21st, 1788, today we celebrate Constitution Day and Citizenship Day.
| | |
Patriot,

While America’s Constitution was ratified on June 21st, 1788, today we celebrate Constitution Day and Citizenship Day.

The Constitution is our cornerstone document that deserves appropriate recognition, and more importantly, greater education among our citizens and elected officials.

Today, only one in four Americans can name the three branches of government.

One in three Americans can’t name one right protected by the First Amendment.

These statistics are known and exploited by politicians on the left to trample on our God given rights and liberties.

In 2020, we’ve seen this happen repeatedly. In Pennsylvania, by decree, the Democrat governor required residents to literally stay in their homes and shut down businesses with draconian restrictions.

Democrat Governor Whitmer in Michigan enacted similar restrictions, leading to public revolt.

At the local level, even my hometown of West Palm Beach, Florida the elected officials used executive orders to enact unconstitutional curfews and override our second amendment rights.

In most Democrat-run states and localities, the Pandemic has been used repeatedly to violate the rights of Americans while continuing to harm our economy.

Rather than focus on protecting our Seniors and those most at risk to COVID-19 with sensible support and solutions, Democrat politicians have used their offices to further panic, and increase government control – their ultimate objective.

Armed with the protection and wisdom of our Founding Fathers, citizens must stand up to Democrat power grabs and constrain government to its constitutional limitations. There’s only one way to do that, on November 3rd, vote for candidates on the ballot who respect the original intent of the Constitution. Vote Republican.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Indiana: The Nation's Adoption Leader
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Indiana leads the nation for increasing the number of children adopted from foster care. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/indiana-the-nations-adoption-leader?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f791dff0c3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican,

Indiana’s known for setting records. And today, our pro-life governor and our pro-life federal administration announced perhaps Indiana’s most meaningful record yet:

**_Indiana is now the top state in the ENTIRE NATION for increasing the number of children adopted from foster care_** _._

In fiscal year 2019, __2,489 Hoosier__ __children__ were adopted through the Indiana Department of Child Services (DCS).
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c18726c494&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [WATCH & SHARE: Gov. Holcomb Announces Adoption Record](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=beb998439f&e=1acd9bb3d6 "WATCH & SHARE: Gov. Holcomb Announces Adoption Record")
---
| **“I make a lot of jobs announcements, and those in many respects pale in comparison to the impact that 2,489 number is having on the families in our state and the true opportunities people will have to realize their God-given talents and their future.”
-Governor Holcomb **
Setting a national record like this doesn’t just happen – it takes intentional action, and a commitment from top leaders. Thankfully, Governor Holcomb is leading the charge, as he made increasing adoptions a key priority in his Next Level Agenda. Here’s how:
* Gov. Holcomb created the first adoption unit within DCS. Each region has gained additional staff whose sole focus is to assist family case managers with finding permanent homes for children when parental rights have been terminated.
* DCS has more than doubled the number of adoption consultants in Indiana from seven to 19 and provided specialized training.
* The agency also launched an enhanced database for better tracking of adoption inquiries and a digital picture book of [Indiana’s Waiting Children](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a77fe80cde&e=1acd9bb3d6).
* DCS is looking at identifying barriers to adoption and additional strategies to remove them through the Adoption Rapid Permanency Review.

Because of Indiana’s record-breaking year for increasing children adopted from foster care, today the Trump Administration is awarding Indiana $4.7 million to continue to enhance our child welfare system – helping even more Hoosier children in need.
**“Every child deserves to have people who will love and support them forever, so we’ve set out to ensure each is a part of a permanent, loving family. With more than a thousand kids in Indiana who are still waiting to be adopted, we appreciate our federal partners’ continued support as we pursue forever homes for each and every one.”**
**-Governor Holcomb**
And, of course, this is in addition to Indiana’s incredible work lowering our infant mortality rate today to its lowest point in six years, having decreased from 7.3 to 6.8 deaths per 1,000 live births. This translates to saving real lives. Thank you, Governor Holcomb, for your leadership – and for your commitment to Indiana’s kids.

-Indiana Republican Party
---
|
---
---
---

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: I will stand with veterans and respect their service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
While I attended the groundbreaking of a new VA Clinic in Peru, Jackie sent a surrogate in her place. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b55d25261d&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friend,

Earlier this week, I had the great honor of discussing issues facing our veteran community at the groundbreaking of a new Veterans Affairs clinic in Peru, Indiana. Where was Jackie? We couldn't tell you -- because she sent a surrogate on her behalf.

Jackie Walorski has also been missing as veterans -- those who have made the ultimate sacrifice -- have been disparaged in our country by the Commander in Chief. In fact, she's [been complicit in dishonoring our military and country. ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=04382c815b&e=5886ca081d)

Jackie promised to fix the current VA system. People are still waiting.

Friend, will you consider [a contribution to my campaign](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=3a4aefe511&e=5886ca081d)? Our veterans deserve better. The people of Indiana deserve better.
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=ee04675bb5&e=5886ca081d)
---
| I was proud to meet with veterans and our Veterans Affairs medical team yesterday to understand the issues facing our community.

[**If I have the privilege to serve as Congresswoman for the Second District, I will honor veterans in my words and my actions.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=e498cec729&e=5886ca081d)

As the daughter of a WWII veteran with a brother-in-law and nephew who served active duty tours in Iraq and Korea, and a niece attending one of our military academies, I recognize the sacrifice that our service members and military families make every single day.
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=087c0fa2b2&e=5886ca081d)
---
| If you're interested in learning more about where I stand on veterans issues, you can watch [a forum I hosted on May 28](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=0fb0e1e7d7&e=5886ca081d) with veterans Rodger J. Pinto, United States Army; Celeste Ross, United States Marine Corps; and Andrew Stryker, Indiana Army National Guard.

Be well,

Pat
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Troy=20Downing?=
subject: Montana Farm Bureau Endorses Downing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
The Montana Farm Bureau sees Troy Downing as being the Pro-Agriculture candidate in the State Auditor's Office |
---
| |
---
| |
# Montana Farm Bureau Endorses [Troy Downing](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=ae148bfe33&e=a212bb87cc)

# **I am proud to announce that the Montana Farm Bureau Federation has endorsed my campaign for State Auditor. Since the beginning of this campaign I have been the only candidate with both an understanding and real plans for managing our state trust lands. **

**importantly I have always been a strong ally of this backbone of our economy--our farmers and ranchers.

As a combat veteran I often think about national security. One of the easiest ways to bring down a country is to not allow it to feed itself. Our agricultural heritage plays a vital role in feeding America.

As a member of the Board of Land Commissioners, I promise that our farmers and ranchers will always have a seat at the table to discuss their needs and pain points. Together we will continue to have a positive affect on our economy and preserve our rural heritage.

Thank you to the Montana Farm Bureau Federation for your support. **

**-Troy**

PS: The election is coming upon us quickly. If you can help support our campaign, it is greatly appreciated and helpful. Can you contribute $25, $50, or even $100 today?

**Donate >> [HERE](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=93df25ee9d&e=a212bb87cc) <<**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Join us for a watch party 🎉
body:
Join us to watch the premiere of 'The Glorias' | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5b1ed1e99258/join-us-for-a-watch-party?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | Join Jennifer Welch, the President of Planned Parenthood Illinois; Nikita Richards, the McClean County Democrats Chair and Illinois Council on Women and Girls; Leni Hoppenworth, Indivisible Illinois and Women's March Chicago; and me for a Watch Party at 6:30 on September 30th for the premiere of the Julie Taymor film ['The Glorias.'](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=3478629e5b&e=140a9b81e7)
I am so excited about this movie. Gloria Steinem has long been a personal hero of mine. As a feminist myself, I am truly inspired by her relentless fight to protect a woman’s right to choose and gender equality. Being a woman is one of the most important parts of who I am, as it’s the primary lens from which I have experienced the world in all of its glory and injustices. That is why I am so proud to have received Gloria’s endorsement last month.
The film will be viewed virtually via Amazon Watch Party (must have an Amazon Prime account to view); discussion group to follow immediately afterward via Zoom. Links will be sent to ticketholders on the day of the event.
**[Click here to buy tickets.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=8074b320f8&e=140a9b81e7)**
** I hope to see you there!

Dani Brzozowski** **Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16**

clean_body: Jon's race in Georgia is key to swinging Senate control! | "" Friend, the GOP is in real danger: The Republicans' U.S. Senate majority is slipping through their fingers. Democrats have the momentum to net four seats and retake control of the Senate , and it's looking like it will come down to one key state: Georgia. Jon Ossoff is UP in the polls right now, but we're not comfortable with just a one- or two-point margin.We need to increase Jon's lead NOW with Election Season already upon us! Jon's opponent, Senator David Perdue, was too busy trying to line his own pockets in January and February to warn his constituents about the pandemic -- and he thinks that with nearly 200,000 Americans dead, Donald Trump's response has been "strong." We need Perdue gone, friend. #
We want to make sure you don't forget that **our Weekend of Action starts tomorrow, and we need your help to reach as many voters as possible. **

With just 47 days until November 3rd, and with early voting starting in 1 week, it's more critical than ever that we get Dani's message out there to the voters. Last weekend we were able to reach over 4,300 voters, and this weekend we need to do even better. **Can we count on you to sign up for a shift and make calls for Dani?**

We've got a great chance to unseat Adam Kinzinger thanks to the work you have put in for us, and now we need you to help us get over the finish line! So[ click here to sign up to make calls this weekend](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a7d0a3d945&e=140a9b81e7), and help us take back IL-16.

Team Dani
